questionHtml: Explain the relationship between infection by the bacterium Vibrio cholerae and dehydration.
markschemeHtml:
a. V. cholerae releases toxin 

b. chloride channels activated 

c. chloride ions are pumped out of cells 

d. leading to fluid loss from intestine/diarrhea 

e. associated vomiting contributes to dehydration

meta.title: Explain the relationship between infection by the bacterium Vibrio cholerae and dehydration.
